scripts.build: pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:viewer
scripts.helper:agents: pnpm run build:server && node dist/src/cli.js helper agents
scripts.helper:setup: pnpm run build:server && node dist/src/cli.js helper setup
scripts.helper:skill: pnpm run build:server && node dist/src/cli.js helper skill
scripts.ingest: pnpm run build:server && node dist/src/cli.js ingest
scripts.agents:append: pnpm run build:server && node dist/src/cli.js helper agents --output AGENTS.md --append
scripts.skill:write: pnpm run build:server && node dist/src/cli.js helper skill --output .agents/skills/docs-ssh/SKILL.md
scripts.sources:list: pnpm run build:server && node dist/src/cli.js sources list
